name: dev-loop
description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. v1.16.1: setup-dev-loop Section M now probes Codex via `codex-companion.mjs setup --json` runtime check (authoritative ready/codex.available signal) — replaces brittle file-existence glob that gave false negatives; auth-aware install hints. v1.16.0: auto-archive originating raw transcripts on work-item completion via `closes:` frontmatter convention — RETRO step parses closes list and runs `skillwiki archive` per entry, eliminating manual cleanup. v1.15.0: pluggable multi-backend code review — CODE_REVIEW_BACKENDS resolved at REFRESH; REVIEW step 6 spawns simplify-worker (always) + optional codex-review-worker (per-intensity opt-in) in parallel; new wrapper agent dev-loop:codex-review-worker delegates to codex:codex-rescue. v1.14.0: doctor-worker probes auto-compact firings via isCompactSummary:true in session jsonl; REFRESH thresholds; AUDIT surfaces CC built-in Auto-Memory. v1.13.0: removed /compact + /clear refs. v1.12.0: dep-drift detector via dev-loop:doctor-worker; required-missing blocks, optional-missing warns + DEP_DRIFT drives fallback. MERGE CI gate uses ci-health-worker. Execution subagents hard-wired to sonnet. Pluggable interview phase. /setup-dev-loop scaffolds 13 config sections (A-M). Pluggable knowledge backends, drift guard, project-agnostic.
